General.Name: Recharge Metals Ltd
General.Description: Recharge Metals Limited focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Australia, Canada, and the United States. The company explores for lithium, copper, gold, and uranium deposits. Recharge Metals Limited was incorporated in 2021 and is based in Perth, Australia.

2.Name: Mr. Joel Christopher Ives B.A., B.Com., B.Sc., C.A.
2.Title: Company Secretary
